data.title: [af9e-77fc] RED: Write unit tests for migrate-runtime-refs.py (inject, replace, annotate)
data.description:
## What to do
Create tests/scripts/test-migrate-runtime-refs.py with failing (RED) unit tests for migrate-runtime-refs.py before the script exists.

## Tests to write
- test_inject_plugin_root: script missing _PLUGIN_ROOT gets declaration injected after shebang line; already-declared scripts are unchanged (idempotent)
- test_inject_handles_set_e: scripts with #!/usr/bin/env bash + set -e on line 2 get _PLUGIN_ROOT injected after set -e, not between shebang and set -e
- test_replace_code_line: non-comment line with plugins/dso/scripts/foo.sh → ${_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/foo.sh
- test_replace_skips_comment_line: comment line with # plugins/dso/... is NOT modified (scope boundary with S1)
- test_annotate_git_relative: line matching git-relative pattern gets # plugin-self-ref-ok: git-relative path pattern appended
- test_dry_run_no_mutation: --dry-run prints diffs but makes no file changes
- test_idempotent: running twice produces same result as once

## Files to create
- tests/scripts/test-migrate-runtime-refs.py

## testing_mode: RED
All tests must FAIL before migrate-runtime-refs.py exists.
